name: Chocolate Chocolate Chunk Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 oz milk chocolate, cut into 1/4" to 1/2" pieces
6 oz bittersweet chocolate, cut into 1/4" to 1/2" pieces
recipeInstructions:
() Place the walnuts in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake at 400°F for about 5 minutes, shaking the sheet a couple of times. Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly butter twelve 3-by-1 1/4 inch muffin cups.
In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the butter and unsweetened chocolate. Remove from heat and cool mixture until tepid. In a large bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt. In another bowl, stir together buttermilk and brown sugar until smooth. Then stir in chocolate/butter mixture, egg and vanilla until combined. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture. Add liquid ingredients and stir just to combine. Stir in chocolates and walnuts. Spoon batter evenly among prepared muffin cups. Bake 19 to 22 minutes, or until a cake tester or toothpick inserted into center of one muffin comes out with few crumbs remaining. Remove muffin tin from wire rack. Cool muffins in pan for 5 minutes. Remove muffins from cups and finish cooling on rack. Serve warm or cool completely. Store muffins in an airtight container at room temperature. Makes about 12 muffins.
